final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (小红书 cover) for a pearl milk tea product, girly pink aesthetic with a summer refreshing vibe.

Style/medium: pastel flat-lay editorial photography, soft dreamy tones inspired by Korean beauty brand campaigns
Composition: vertical portrait frame, centered subject with generous negative space, slight top-down angle
Subject: a tall cup of pearl milk tea with visible tapioca pearls, condensation droplets on the cup surface, pastel pink paper straw
Scene/backdrop: soft pink and white gradient background, scattered pink flower petals and ice cubes as props
Lighting/mood: bright diffused natural light from above, airy and cool summer freshness, light and cheerful mood
Color palette: blush pink as dominant, white and cream as base, translucent pearl tones as accent
Materials/textures: dewy condensation on cup, glossy tapioca pearls, soft petal surfaces
Avoid: dark shadows, moody low-key lighting, cluttered background, oversaturated neon colors, generic stock photo flatness
